preferred_name_ml.zh: 存在用於記錄的數據格式 (PQDIF)

definition: format for files containing measurements, waveforms, events and intended to provide an easily interpretable format for use in exchanging data, known as “power quality data interchange format”

definition_ml.en: format for files containing measurements, waveforms, events and intended to provide an easily interpretable format for use in exchanging data, known as “power quality data interchange format”
definition_ml.fr: format de fichier contenant des mesures, des formes d'onde, des événements facilement interprétable pour l'échange de données et utilisant le format «power quality data interchange format ”
definition_ml.de: Dateiformat für Messwerte, Kurvenformen und Ereignisse, das ein leicht zu interpretierendes Format für den Datenaustausch bereitstellt, bekannt als “Power Quality Data Interchange Format”
definition_ml.zh: 包含测量、波形、事件的文件格式，旨在提供用于交换数据的易于解释的格式，称为“电能质量数据交换格式”

note: This format is defined in IEEEE STD 1159.3

note_ml.en: This format is defined in IEEEE STD 1159.3
note_ml.fr: Note – Ce format est défini dans la norme IEEEE STD 1159.3
note_ml.de: Anmerkung: Dieses Format ist in IEEE Std.1159.3 definiert
note_ml.zh: 注：此格式在IEEEE STD 1159.3中定义
